div.p: Checkpoint-aware log replay with corruption handling

ol.li: Corruption-tolerant: Invalid magic or checksum → skip & continue
Crash-safe: Stops on truncated reads (partial write at crash)
No duplicates: Each entry processed at most once

div.p: Offset 0x00: magic (0xFEEDFACE) Offset 0x04: entry_size Offset 0x08: sequence Offset 0x10: timestamp_ns Offset 0x18: checksum (CRC32) Offset 0x1C: flags
